purpose: Exact rustc pin for C06 L60 (pairs with repo-root rust-toolchain.toml)
identity: rustc -vV commit-hash (content-addressed rustc identity; rustup verifies download digests)
ci_policy: Primary workflows install via dtolnay/rust-toolchain without toolchain: override so rust-toolchain.toml is authoritative. Nightly-only jobs (fuzz/miri) may override intentionally.
update_policy: Bump channel in rust-toolchain.toml and this file together (refresh commit-hash via rustc -vV); re-run SelfCheck before merge.
